title: How did Roy stop the thieves?

meanings.usage: 表示对过去的行为感到后悔
常用于get a fright短语中
表示识别出某人或某物
指依法逮捕犯罪嫌疑人

phrases.usage: 表示过去习惯性的动作或状态，现在已不再发生

examples.en: Roy used to drive a taxi.

phrases.usage: 表示不久之前，相当于not long ago

examples.en: A short while ago, he became a bus driver.
examples.zh: 不久之前，他成了一名公交车司机。

phrases.usage: far用于加强比较级，表示更加、得多

examples.en: He is finding his new work far more exciting.
examples.zh: 他发现新工作更加令人兴奋。

examples.en: He saw two thieves rush out of a shop.
examples.zh: 他看见两个小偷从一家商店冲出来。

examples.en: The thieves ran towards a waiting car.
examples.zh: 小偷们朝一辆等候的汽车跑去。

examples.en: Roy acted quickly and drove the bus straight at the thieves.
examples.zh: Roy迅速行动，把公交车直接开向小偷。

examples.en: The one with the money got such a fright that he dropped the bag.
examples.zh: 拿着钱的小偷吓得把袋子都掉了。

examples.en: As the thieves were trying to get away in their car...
examples.zh: 当小偷们试图开车逃走时...

examples.en: Shortly afterwards, the police stopped the car.
examples.zh: 不久之后，警察拦住了那辆车。

grammar.title: used to + 动词原形
grammar.definition: 表示过去经常发生的动作或存在的状态，而现在已不再发生
grammar.structure: 主语 + used to + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去的习惯或状态，与现在形成对比

examples.en: Roy used to drive a taxi.
He used to smoke, but now he doesn't.
examples.zh: 他以前抽烟，但现在不抽了。

grammar.title: such...that... 结果状语从句
grammar.definition: such后面接名词，that引导结果状语从句，表示如此...以至于...
grammar.structure: such + a/an + 形容词 + 可数名词单数 + that...
grammar.usage: 强调程度之高导致某种结果

examples.en: He got such a fright that he dropped the bag.
It was such a hot day that we went swimming.
examples.zh: 天气太热了，我们去游泳了。

grammar.title: While + 过去进行时
grammar.definition: while引导的时间状语从句，表示两个动作同时进行
grammar.structure: While + 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing, 主语 + 动词过去式
grammar.usage: 用于描述两个正在进行的动作同时发生

examples.en: While the battered car was moving away, Roy stopped his bus.
examples.zh: 当那辆破车开走时，Roy停下了公交车。

examples.en: While I was reading, she was cooking.
examples.zh: 我看书的时候，她在做饭。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + used to + 动词原形

original.en: Roy Trenton used to drive a taxi.

imitations.en: I used to live in Shanghai.
She used to play the piano.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + saw + 宾语 + 动词原形

original.en: He saw two thieves rush out of a shop.
original.zh: 他看见两个小偷从一家商店冲出来。

imitations.en: I saw him leave the room.
She saw the bird fly away.

sentencePatterns.pattern: such + a/an + 形容词 + 名词 + that...

original.en: The one with the money got such a fright that he dropped the bag.
original.zh: 拿着钱的小偷吓得把袋子都掉了。

imitations.en: He made such a mistake that everyone laughed.
imitations.zh: 他犯了如此可笑的错误，大家都笑了。

imitations.en: It was such a beautiful day that we went to the park.
imitations.zh: 天气太好了，我们去了公园。

original.en: Roy acted quickly and drove the bus straight at the thieves.
original.zh: Roy迅速行动，把公交车直接开向小偷。

imitations.en: The fireman acted quickly and saved the child.
imitations.zh: 消防员迅速行动，救了那个孩子。

imitations.en: She acted quickly when she saw the accident.
imitations.zh: 看到事故时她迅速采取了行动。
